prerequisites.value: Int 13; Combat Expertise; Improved Dirty Trick; Kitsune Style; Kitsune Tricks; base attack bonus +6 or monk level 6th.

description.value: **Benefit:** While using the Kitsune Style feat, when a foe provokes an attack of opportunity from you, you can attempt to perform a dirty trick combat maneuver in place of making a melee attack.
